eas_text: A civil authority has issued A MISSING AND ENDANGERED PERSON ALERT for the following counties or areas: Breckinridge; Grayson, KY; at 4:35 AM on JUL 3, 2026 Effective until 9:35 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: An IAN Alert has been issued for Aiden Hill a 15 year-old black male last seen in Breckenridge County Kentucky on 07/02/26 at approximately 10 pm. Aiden is described as 5 foot 3 inches 130 pounds wearing black or gray shorts and blue crocs. Stay tuned to local media for more information. Please remain alert and check local media for updates. If you see or if you have any information contact 911 immediately.
